stemHtml: For two-engined aeroplanes not approved for ETOPS, the take-off alternate, if required, shall be located (in still air conditions) within:

options.a: two hours flight time at cruising speed with all engines operating.
options.b: one hour flight time at holding speed with one engine inoperative.
options.c: two hours flight time at one engine inoperative cruising speed.
options.d: one hour flight time at one engine inoperative cruising speed.
